evals.prompt: Generate architecture-rules.md for this Laravel + React monorepo. Product is under apps/billing-api/ with backend/ and frontend/.
evals.expected_output: Agent scans manifests and layout, drafts lean canonical rule at apps/billing-api/.nextstage-harness/rules/architecture-rules.md with stack table, layout, test commands, no business spec content, then runs harness sync.

evals.prompt: Our architecture-rules.md is outdated after we moved modules to app/Modules/. Refresh it — keep the Portuguese communication bullet.
evals.expected_output: Agent refreshes in place, updates module layout from code, preserves hand-edited communication rule, stays under ~200 lines, runs harness sync.

evals.prompt: Bootstrap agent context for a legacy PHP repo that uses ns-util. No architecture-rules yet but we have docs/specs/.
evals.expected_output: Agent generates canonical constitution, detects NsUtil, links to nsutil-architecture-rules.md instead of inlining, points specs to docs/specs/, updates manifest, runs harness sync.
